task_completion.description: Verify that the Consolidated P&L table in Section 2 has updated totals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the P&L table in Section 2. The Total Revenue row should show $4,435,700, Total Expenses should show $3,432,500, and Net Operating Income should show $1,003,200.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 5-year CapEx projection table is created in Section 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a table in Section 4 containing 4 projects (Sawmill, Kiln, Wastewater, Fleet) and columns for FY2024 through FY2028.

task_completion.description: Verify that the CapEx table is on a landscape-oriented page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the page containing the CapEx table. It should be visibly wider (landscape orientation) compared to the standard portrait pages.

task_completion.description: Verify the CapEx table totals and the executive note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The CapEx table should have a bottom row with totals: FY24=$1,965,000, FY25=$4,410,000, FY26=$2,145,000, FY27=$885,000, FY28=$430,000. Just below the table, there should be a text note mentioning '60% complete'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Sections 2, 4, and 5 are styled as Heading 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the headings for Sections 2, 4, and 5. They should be visually larger and match the style of Sections 1 and 3, rather than just being bold body text.

task_completion.description: Verify that an auto-generated Table of Contents is inserted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Table of Contents block immediately after the title page, listing the document's sections with page numbers.
Look at the bottom of the pages. There should be a footer with 'PNTP — CONFIDENTIAL' aligned to the left and 'Page X of Y' (e.g., Page 2 of 4) aligned to the right.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used LibreOffice Writer to edit the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show LibreOffice Writer's GUI being used to edit the .odt file, insert tables, and format styles.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened the financial data JSON file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of financial_data.json to extract the numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the document is saved with the correct new filename.
integrity.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice window title bar or a Save As dialog should show the filename 'PNTP_Q3_Review_FY2024.odt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
P&L Table Correct Totals: Total Revenue = $4,435,700, Total Expenses = $3,432,500, Net Operating Income = $1,003,200.
CapEx Table Correct Totals: FY2024 = $1,965,000, FY2025 = $4,410,000, FY2026 = $2,145,000, FY2027 = $885,000, FY2028 = $430,000.
CapEx Note: Must contain '60% complete'.
Footer: 'PNTP — CONFIDENTIAL' (left), 'Page X of Y' (right).
Headings: Sections 2, 4, and 5 must be Heading 1 style.
TOC: Must be auto-generated and placed after the title page.
Orientation: CapEx table must be on a landscape page.
